title: Microsoft Teams and OneDrive Integration
excerpt: I am sure this has been requested before but are there plans to provide integration for both Microsoft Teams and OneDrive? Our team uses Office 365 and it would be great if the platform supported both of these applicatio…

posts.author: rmccallen (Roger)
posts.cookedHtml: I am sure this has been requested before but are there plans to provide integration for both Microsoft Teams and OneDrive? Our team uses Office 365 and it would be great if the platform supported both of these applications.

posts.author: lauralev (Laura Levy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there! Microsoft teams is on the way!

As for OneDrive, I’ve added a +1 for that request with our product team.

Let us know if you have any other ideas.

posts.author: rmccallen (Roger)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any update on Microsoft Teams integration?

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

Just checking you saw the announcement about the integration with MS Teams? NEW Integrations: Ms Teams & Google Sheets

Let us know what you think!!

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @rmccallen
Just checking you saw this post for our new embedded integration with MS teams: Microsoft Teams App Release!

Would love to hear what you think?
